content.headline: Introduction to Meditation
content.body: Meditation is a powerful tool for mental clarity and stress reduction. This program will guide you through various techniques to help you develop a consistent practice.

content.headline: Getting Started
content.body: Find a quiet space where you won't be disturbed. Sit comfortably with your back straight. Start with just 5 minutes and gradually increase as you become more comfortable.

content.mantra: Your mind is your greatest ally

missions.title: Find a quiet space
missions.description: Somewhere you won't be disturbed for 10 mins.
